data.illustration_philosophy: Simple line-and-fill food and bowl motifs in the Rasa palette — friendly, geometric, warm, never cartoonish. Illustration carries the calm and the everyday-Indian-food feeling where photography can't (empty states, onboarding, emails, spot art). It should feel drawn by a competent, warm hand, not a mascot factory.

style.construction: Rounded line-and-fill; consistent 2.5px stroke on a 24px grid; soft corners; flat matte fills, no gradients.
style.geometry: Bowls, plates, spice dots, a level 'balance' line, simple dishes (roti, bowl of dal, chicken bowl, thali).
style.color: Saffron and green fills on cream; charred-cardamom line; tomato reserved for the tap/confirm dot only.
style.line_and_fill: Outline with a single flat accent fill; two colours max per spot illustration plus the line.
style.tone: Warm, calm, a little witty — a bowl with a tiny 'zzz' at midnight, a plate exhaling. Never a diet-scold or a hype-mascot.

data.no_mascot_rule: Rasa has no anthropomorphic mascot. If a 'friend who cooks' presence is needed, imply it through hands and warmth, not a character.

illustration_sets.purpose: Warm the copy-paste onboarding and first-run.

spots.name: answer-once
spots.description: A speech bubble and a bowl — 'answer a few questions once.'

spots.name: plan-built
spots.description: A calm calendar-grid of small bowls — 'your month, planned.'

spots.name: one-tap
spots.description: A finger dot pressing a bowl with a tomato tap-ripple — 'you always tap yes.'

illustration_sets.purpose: Calm, non-blaming empty and waiting states.

spots.name: no-plan-yet
spots.description: An empty plate outline with a soft spice dot — 'nothing planned yet.'

spots.name: kitchen-closed
spots.description: A bowl with a small 'zzz' — 'this restaurant is closed; we'll pick a fallback.'

spots.name: all-caught-up
spots.description: A level balance-line over a bowl — 'you're all set for today.'

illustration_sets.purpose: Illustrate the three pillars in marketing and emails.

spots.name: macros-balanced
spots.description: A bowl with three soft arcs (P/C/F) held level — balance, estimated.

spots.name: under-cap
spots.description: A wallet-bowl with a green level line under a marked cap.

spots.name: one-tap-safe
spots.description: A shield-bowl with a small check and a tomato tap dot — 'nothing spent silently.'

illustration_sets.purpose: Header spot art and shareable moments.

spots.name: welcome-bowl
spots.description: A warm saffron bowl with a leaf notch — welcome/header art.

spots.name: shareable-prompt
spots.description: A chat bubble spilling into a bowl — the copy-paste onboarding prompt as a shareable object.

do: Keep two accent colours max plus the line.
Use tomato only for a tap/confirm dot.
Keep it warm and calm; a light wit is welcome.
dont: No mascot or anthropomorphic food characters.
No medical or 'doctor' symbols; nutrition is wellness, not medicine.
